## Decisions, risks, assumptions, and project-state updates

- [ ] `governance/project-state.json` reconciled if status changed
- [ ] generated status views regenerated
- [ ] decision log reviewed
- [ ] risk and assumption registers reviewed
- [ ] competitor radar and compatibility matrix reviewed where relevant
- [ ] evidence added or referenced

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run project:generate`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run project:validate`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
